description: Curated Py-GC/MS NOM/SOM/sediment compound-name marker metadata for CSV classification.
scope: Py-GC/MS compound-name and pattern rules for L/P/C/F/O classification and CSV output

confidence_scale.A: diagnostic marker or strong model-system/literature support
confidence_scale.C: generic or multi-origin marker; use with caution
confidence_scale.E: not used in Core CSV package

sources.authors: Christy, A. A.; Bruchet, A.; Rybacki, D.
sources.title: Characterization of natural organic matter by pyrolysis-GC-MS
sources.extracted_classes: biopolymer/carbohydrate; proteinaceous materials; N-acetylamino sugars; polyhydroxy aromatics
sources.evidence_basis: abstract class assignment of NOM pyrolysates

sources.authors: Tolu, J.; Gerber, L.; Boily, J.-F.; Bindler, R.
sources.title: High-throughput characterization of sediment organic matter by pyrolysis–gas chromatography/mass spectrometry and multivariate curve resolution: A promising analytical tool in (paleo)limnology
sources.extracted_classes: straight n-alkanes; nitrogen compounds; ketones; chlorophyll pyrolysis products; sterols; carbohydrates; lignin products
sources.evidence_basis: method/results text on extensive sediment OM fingerprints

sources.authors: Fabbri, D.; Sangiorgi, F.; Vassura, I.
sources.title: Pyrolysis–GC–MS to trace terrigenous organic matter in marine sediments: a comparison between pyrolytic and lipid markers in the Adriatic Sea
sources.extracted_classes: proteins; carbohydrates; chlorophylls; lignin methoxyphenols; n-alkanes/n-alkanols/sterols comparison
sources.evidence_basis: abstract/highlights on biological precursors and lignin methoxyphenols

sources.authors: Mehrabanian, M.
sources.title: Molecular geochemistry of soil organic matter by pyrolysis gas chromatography/mass spectrometry (GC/MS) technique: A review
sources.journal: Journal of Soil Science and Environmental Management
sources.extracted_classes: aliphatics; fatty acids; sterols; carbohydrates; lignin; aromatic compounds; PAHs; N-containing compounds

sources.authors: Derenne, S.; Quénéa, K.
sources.title: Analytical pyrolysis as a tool to probe soil organic matter
sources.journal: Journal of Analytical and Applied Pyrolysis
sources.extracted_classes: SOM pyrolysis markers; carbohydrates; lignin; proteins/N; lipids; charcoal/black carbon
sources.evidence_basis: review synthesis of SOM marker interpretation

sources.authors: Derenne, S.; Nguyen Tu, T. T.
sources.title: Characterizing the molecular structure of organic matter from natural environments: An analytical challenge
sources.extracted_classes: carbohydrate; lignin; protein; lipid; charcoal
sources.evidence_basis: five reference components for natural OM

sources.authors: Picó, Y.; Barceló, D.
sources.title: Pyrolysis gas chromatography-mass spectrometry in environmental analysis: Focus on organic matter and microplastics
sources.extracted_classes: humic substances; organic matter components; lignins; macromolecular units

sources.authors: Rencoret, J.; del Río, J. C.; Nierop, K. G. J.; Gutiérrez, A.; Ralph, J.
sources.title: Rapid Py-GC/MS assessment of the structural alterations of lignins in genetically modified plants
sources.journal: Journal of Analytical and Applied Pyrolysis
sources.extracted_classes: guaiacyl; syringyl; p-hydroxyphenyl; lignin phenols

sources.authors: Mattonai, M.; Tamburini, D.; Colombini, M. P.; Ribechini, E.
sources.title: Timing in Analytical Pyrolysis: Py(HMDS)-GC/MS of Glucose and Cellulose Using Online Micro Reaction Sampler
sources.extracted_classes: levoglucosan derivatives; glucose/cellulose pyrolysis products

sources.authors: Mullen, C. A.; Boateng, A. A.
sources.title: Catalytic pyrolysis-GC/MS of lignin from several sources
sources.extracted_classes: phenolic lignin products; methoxyphenols; aromatic products

sources.authors: Shang, W.; Wang, S.; Ling, Y.; Xie, M.; Dong, S.; Sun, Q.; Cen, K.
sources.title: Holocene pyrolytic nitrogen compounds by using pyrolysis-GC/MS and its paleoclimatic implication from Jinchuan peatbog, NE China
sources.extracted_classes: pyrolytic nitrogen compounds; protein/microbial N markers

sources.authors: Gajendra, N. et al.
sources.title: Impacts of temperature and fluid seepage on organic carbon cycling in marine sediments
sources.extracted_classes: lipid-derived compounds; PAHs; nitrogen-containing compounds; carbohydrate-derived compounds
sources.evidence_basis: profile text from accessible author manuscript

sources.authors: Zhang, Z. et al.
sources.title: Impacts of land use change on soil organic matter molecular composition using Py-GC/MS
sources.extracted_classes: aromatics; PAHs; n-alkanes; n-alkenes; other aliphatics; fatty acids; lignin; phenols; polysaccharides; benzofuran; N-containing compounds
sources.evidence_basis: abstract class changes under land-use change

sources.authors: Klein, K. et al.
sources.title: Peat organic matter molecular composition determined by FTIR, Py-GC/MS and THM-GC/MS
sources.extracted_classes: lignin; benzenes; C29 sterols; sesquiterpenes; N compounds; phenols; polysaccharides

sources.authors: Colín-García, M. et al.
sources.title: Sources of organic matter elucidated through Pyr-GC-MS, and implications for geological sediments
sources.journal: Boletín de la Sociedad Geológica Mexicana
sources.extracted_classes: functional groups / moieties in sediments

sources.authors: Lu, Q.; Yang, X.-c.; Dong, C.-q.; Zhang, Z.-f.; Zhang, X.-m.; Zhu, X.-f.
sources.title: Influence of pyrolysis temperature and time on the cellulose fast pyrolysis products: Analytical Py-GC/MS study
sources.journal: Journal of Analytical and Applied Pyrolysis
sources.extracted_classes: pyrans (levoglucosan, levoglucosenone); furans (furfural, 5-HMF); small oxygenates (acetaldehyde, 1-hydroxy-2-propanone)

sources.authors: Ponder, G. R.; Richards, G. N.; et al. (carbohydrate isotopic-labeling series)
sources.title: Carbohydrate pyrolysis mechanisms from isotopic labeling: pyrolysis of d-glucose and formation of furans
sources.journal: Journal of Analytical and Applied Pyrolysis
sources.extracted_classes: furan series (furan; 2-methylfuran; 2,5-dimethylfuran; furfural; 5-methylfurfural; furfuryl alcohol; angelica lactone; 5-HMF)

sources.authors: Biller, P.; Ross, A. B.
sources.title: Pyrolysis GC-MS as a novel analysis technique to determine the biochemical composition of microalgae
sources.extracted_classes: carbohydrate markers (3-methyl-1,2-cyclopentanedione; furfural; levoglucosenone); protein/lipid markers

sources.authors: Holmes, M. E.; et al. (central Sweden Holocene lake records)
sources.title: Molecular changes in organic matter composition in two Holocene lake-sediment records using pyrolysis-GC/MS
sources.extracted_classes: 12 lacustrine Py classes: carbohydrates; n-alkanes; n-alkenes; N-compounds; phenols; chlorophylls; lignin oligomers; steroids; alkan-2-ones; hopanoids; (poly)aromatics; tocopherols
sources.evidence_basis: lacustrine sediment class scheme and relative abundances

sources.authors: Wang, S.; et al.
sources.title: Mechanism research on the pyrolysis of seaweed polysaccharides by Py-GC/MS and DFT
sources.journal: Journal of Analytical and Applied Pyrolysis
sources.extracted_classes: furan-dominated pyrolysate; furfural and 5-methylfurfural as major products

sources.authors: Fabbri, D.; Chiavari, G.; et al. (Barcelona harbour humic acids)
sources.title: Analytical pyrolysis of humic acids from sediments: n-alkyl nitrile and amide series with n-alkane/alkene aliphatic signature
sources.extracted_classes: high C-alkyl abundance: n-alkyl nitriles and amides co-varying with n-alkanes/n-alkenes (aliphatic/lipid signature)
sources.evidence_basis: n-alkyl nitrile/amide series grouped with the aliphatic n-alkane/alkene series

sources.authors: Yu, X.; et al. (nitrogenous pyrolysates study)
sources.title: Evaluation of nitrogenous pyrolysates by Py-GC/MS for impacts of proteolytic enzymes (long-chain amide/nitrile origin)
sources.journal: Journal of Analytical and Applied Pyrolysis
sources.extracted_classes: long-chain amides (hexadecanamide) and nitriles (hexadecanenitrile, octadecanenitrile) formed from C16-18 fatty acids interacting with protein thermolysis intermediates

sources.authors: Fabbri, D.; et al.; Colin-Garcia, M.; et al.
sources.title: Seven-category Py-GC/MS OM source scheme (proteins; carbohydrates; fatty acid & lipids; lignin; PAHs; alkylbenzenes; sulphur)
sources.journal: Analytica Chimica Acta / Bol. Soc. Geol. Mex.
sources.extracted_classes: explicit 'fatty acid and lipids (Lp)' category alongside proteins, carbohydrates, lignin, PAHs, alkylbenzenes, sulphur
sources.evidence_basis: lipid class defined to include fatty acids and aliphatics; n-fatty acids convert to n-alkanes on pyrolysis

records.evidence_short: generic phenolic pyrolysate; lignin/tannin or protein/char possible
records.conflict_warning: phenol and simple alkylphenols can also derive from protein, charcoal, or secondary pyrolysis; use confidence field
records.rule_notes: Prefer methoxyphenols over generic phenols for source-specific lignin assignment

records.evidence_short: alkylphenols used as phenolic/lignin related markers
records.conflict_warning: phenol and simple alkylphenols can also derive from protein, charcoal, or secondary pyrolysis; use confidence field
records.rule_notes: Prefer methoxyphenols over generic phenols for source-specific lignin assignment

records.rule_notes: Keep as aromatic/BC subclass; do not force to lignin except resin/lignin context supports it

records.origin_interpretation: cellulose/hemicellulose/polysaccharide pyrolysis (fresh plant or algal carbohydrate)
records.conflict_warning: small furans are not unique; strongest with levoglucosan/HMF/furfural co-occurrence
records.rule_notes: map to C (polysaccharide) for source classification

records.conflict_warning: small furans are not unique; use co-occurrence
records.rule_notes: map to C (polysaccharide)

records.conflict_warning: small furans are not unique; use co-occurrence
records.rule_notes: map to C (polysaccharide)

records.conflict_warning: small furans are not unique; use co-occurrence
records.rule_notes: map to C (polysaccharide)

records.conflict_warning: lactones overlap with carbonyl class; use co-occurrence
records.rule_notes: map to C (polysaccharide)

records.evidence_short: furyl hydroxymethyl ketone; glucose furan marker
records.conflict_warning: use co-occurrence
records.rule_notes: map to C (polysaccharide)

records.origin_interpretation: algal/microbial + plant carbohydrate pyrolysis (used as microalgal carbohydrate marker)
records.conflict_warning: cyclopentanediones overlap carbonyl class; strongest as algal carbohydrate indicator
records.rule_notes: map to C (polysaccharide)

records.conflict_warning: very small oxygenate; non-specific, use only with stronger carbohydrate markers
records.rule_notes: map to C (polysaccharide) with low confidence

records.evidence_short: furoic acid series; carbohydrate furan marker
records.conflict_warning: use co-occurrence
records.rule_notes: map to C (polysaccharide)

records.evidence_short: benzeneacetonitrile; diagnostic protein (Phe) pyrolysis marker (Fabbri et al. 2005)
records.conflict_warning: nitriles can also form by thermal N-alteration; strongest with pyrrole/indole co-occurrence
records.rule_notes: map to P (protein/microbial N)

records.conflict_warning: nitriles multi-origin; use co-occurrence
records.rule_notes: map to P (protein/microbial N)

records.origin_interpretation: peptide/protein pyrolysis cyclic dipeptide (proline-containing DKP diagnostic)
records.conflict_warning: strong protein indicator; requires clean spectrum
records.rule_notes: map to P (protein/microbial N)

records.conflict_warning: isoprenoids multi-origin; use with phytadiene/tocopherol context
records.rule_notes: map to F (lipid/aliphatic)

records.conflict_warning: overlaps carbonyl class; use co-occurrence
records.rule_notes: map to C (polysaccharide) with caution

records.origin_interpretation: long-chain fatty amide; fatty-acid (C16-18) derived (lipid). Forms via fatty acid x protein-N interaction
records.evidence_short: long-chain n-alkyl amide; fatty-acid-derived lipid marker
records.conflict_warning: short/aromatic amides are protein-derived (keep P); only long aliphatic acyl chains route to lipid
records.rule_notes: apply only to long aliphatic chains (C>=12, low DBE); short amides stay protein

records.origin_interpretation: long-chain n-alkyl nitrile; fatty-acid (C16-18) derived (lipid); co-varies with n-alkane/alkene series
records.evidence_short: long-chain n-alkyl nitrile; fatty-acid-derived aliphatic marker
records.conflict_warning: short/aromatic nitriles (acetonitrile, benzonitrile, benzeneacetonitrile) are protein-derived (keep P)
records.rule_notes: apply only to long aliphatic chains (C>=12, low DBE)

records.query_pattern: dodecanoic acid|lauric acid|tetradecanoic acid|myristic acid|decanoic acid|capric acid|pentadecanoic acid|heptadecanoic acid|margaric acid|arachidic acid|eicosanoic acid|behenic acid|docosanoic acid|lignoceric acid
records.origin_interpretation: n-fatty acids (C10-C24); algal/bacterial (short/mid) or plant-wax (long) lipid markers
records.evidence_short: n-fatty-acid series; lipid marker (Fabbri 'fatty acid & lipids'; Tolu 2015)
records.conflict_warning: n-fatty acids partly convert to n-alkanes during pyrolysis; chain-length pattern informs source
records.rule_notes: map to F (lipid); chain length distinguishes aquatic vs terrestrial

records.origin_interpretation: n-alk-1-enes; pyrolysis products of fatty acids/aliphatic biopolymers (lipid/aliphatic)
records.evidence_short: n-alk-1-ene series; aliphatic/lipid marker (co-varies with n-alkanes)
records.conflict_warning: non-specific alone; chain length and odd/even inform source
records.rule_notes: map to F (lipid/aliphatic)

copyright_note: No NIST spectra or copyrighted supplementary tables are included.
